word: G3495 - νεανίσκος - neanískos - neh-an-is'-kos - Young man

sections.paragraph:
- Original: νεανίσκος

- Transliteration: Neaniskos

- Phonetic: neh-an-is'-kos

- Definition:

1. a young man, youth

a. used of a young attendant or servant

- Origin: from the same as G3494

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From the same as G3494; a youth (under forty): - young man.
